TranscriptionNotes: The subject-published WHOOP Advanced Labs walkthrough identifies the panel as 65 biomarkers collected on 8 October 2025 and visibly reports all nine stored values from that panel.

The subject's video published in early June 2025 directly identifies him as 33 years old. A RUNNET article published on 2 April 2026 independently identifies Shervin Shaikh as 33. Because the 8 October 2025 draw falls between those two dated age statements, AgeYears is 33 without inferring or storing a date of birth.
The WellBuilt episode independently identifies Shervin Shaikh as the founder of Shervin Shares and documents the public reach and health-experiment focus of his channel.
Albumin was converted from g/dL to g/L by multiplying by 10.
Creatinine was converted from mg/dL to µmol/L by multiplying by 88.4.
Glucose was converted from mg/dL to mmol/L by multiplying by 0.0555.
